title: Redirect with Custom URL Scheme
excerpt:
Hi there,

posts.author: Valdimar (Valdimar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,

I’d like to implement OAuth login with Monday.com in an internal mobile app, but I’m having trouble setting the custom scheme redirect url in the Monday.com app configuration page. It only accepts https redirect urls and won’t save the url if I enter one with a custom scheme. Is this simply not supported?

This is what the path to the redirect URL settings page I’m talking about looks like:
https://<my-team>.monday.com/apps/manage/<app-id>/app_features/<other-id>/section/redirectUris

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Valdimar - welcome to the community!

Let me check back in with the team on this to verify and get back to you.

-Daniel

posts.author: Valdimar (Valdimar)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @dsilva, thank you! I did manage get in touch with Monday support about this as well, and they are looking into it.

posts.author: AlexSavchuk (Alex Savchuk)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Valdimar

Sounds good Thanks for keeping us in the loop in the community forum as well.

-Alex

posts.author: Valdimar (Valdimar)
posts.cookedHtml: I’ve gotten a response from the developers. They don’t support custom URL schemes for the redirect URL and they don’t have an ETA on when such a feature might be implemented.
